docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2014 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-31-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY RUBINSTEIN, JUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT APPLEGATE, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2014 - JUDGMENT.
